description.overview: One of the rarest breeds, Otterhounds are friendly, boisterous dogs with webbed feet and a love of water. They're gentle family companions.
description.temperament: Known for being amiable, boisterous, even-tempered.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their rough, dense, double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: One of the rarest breeds, Otterhounds are friendly, boisterous dogs with webbed feet and a love of water. They're gentle family companions.
